title: My First Gujarati Conversation
description: Read a simple dialogue between two people meeting for the first time in Gujarati.

blocks.passage:
📖 DIALOGUE — પ્રથમ મુલાકાત (First Meeting)

Rahul:  નમસ્તે! (Namaste!)
        Hello!

Sneha:  નમસ્તે! કેમ છો? (Namaste! Kem chho?)
        Hello! How are you?

Rahul:  હું સારો છું, આભાર. તમે? (Hun saaro chhun, aabhaar. Tame?)
        I am fine, thank you. And you?

Sneha:  હું પણ સારી છું. તમારું નામ શું છે? (Hun pan saari chhun. Tamaarun naam shun chhe?)
        I am also fine. What is your name?

Rahul:  મારું નામ રાહુલ છે. (Maarun naam Rahul chhe.)
        My name is Rahul.

Sneha:  ખૂબ સારું! ક્યાંથી છો? (Khoob saaru! Kyaanthi chho?)
        Very nice! Where are you from?

Rahul:  હું અમદાવાદથી છું. (Hun Amdavaadthi chhun.)
        I am from Ahmedabad.

Sneha:  ગુજરાત ખૂબ સુંદર છે! ફરી મળીશું. (Gujarat khoob sundar chhe! Fari malishun.)
        Gujarat is very beautiful! See you again.

questions.q: How did Sneha respond when asked how she was?
questions.a: She said 'I am also fine' (હું પણ સારી છું)

questions.q: How do you say 'What is your name?' in Gujarati?
questions.a: તમારું નામ શું છે? (Tamaarun naam shun chhe?)

blocks.title: Gujarati Identity
blocks.content: Gujaratis are one of the most widespread diaspora communities in the world, found in UK, USA, East Africa, and Southeast Asia. You'll find Gujarati-speaking communities in over 30 countries! When you learn Gujarati, you connect with a global community proud of their heritage, language, and cuisine.

items.explanation: Yes! 'હું અમદાવાદથી છું' = 'I am from Ahmedabad'.

items.statement: Sneha said she was not feeling well.
items.explanation: No! Sneha said 'હું પણ સારી છું' = 'I am also fine'.
Yes! 'તમે' (tame) is the formal/respectful form. This is correct to use with someone you just met.
